name: Stop, cancel, recover, and stop hook
objective: Prove the daemon/headless runtime exposes lifecycle controls and stop-hook validation state without relying on GUI-owned semantics.
scope: completion gate feedback for model -> tool -> typed result -> model continuation
notCoveredInThisSlice: live GUI stop during active model stream
process-tree termination for retained shell/browser/computer-use children
live GUI failing-test repair loop with hunk accept/reject
